title: AppFlux
description: Store and transfer energy with ME network
body: [![fh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13858665ff42f62b0fc3b8a78e4d4cd59c51b5e5_0.webp)](https://feasthost.org/aff.php?aff=1) Add new cells that allow you to store energy(FE) in ME network. Interact with the energy stored in ME network with Flux Accessor The largest cell can store over 200 trillion FE! You can view how much energy is stored and charge/discharge items in terminal directly.
